dashboard.subtitle: Manage the built-in DeepSeek proxy
dashboard.proNoticeBody: Free Cursor plans only allow Auto mode and cannot select custom models like deepseek-v4-pro. Upgrade to Cursor Pro (or a plan with named models) before using this bridge in chat, Agent, or Composer. This extension cannot bypass Cursor subscription limits.
dashboard.cursorBaseUrlLabel: Cursor Base URL (paste into Cursor Settings → Models)
dashboard.apiBaseUrlEmpty: HTTPS address will appear after starting the proxy
dashboard.configHint: Restart the proxy after changing settings.
dashboard.step1: Click "Start Proxy" and wait for the Base URL
dashboard.step2: Copy Base URL to Cursor Settings → Override OpenAI Base URL
dashboard.step3: Enter your DeepSeek API Key and add model deepseek-v4-pro (requires Cursor Pro — see notice above)
extension.proxyNotStarted: Proxy is not running. Please start the proxy first.
extension.setupWizardMessage: Cursor Pro is required to select the deepseek-v4-pro model. Start the proxy in the control panel, then configure Cursor Models.
extension.proxyStarted:
Proxy started. Set Cursor Base URL to:
{url}
extension.statusBar.running:
DeepSeek proxy running
Click to open control panel
extension.statusBar.starting:
Starting proxy...
Click to open control panel
extension.statusBar.error:
DeepSeek proxy error
Click to open control panel
extension.statusBar.stopped:
DeepSeek proxy stopped
Click to open control panel
extension.proxyPrepareFailed: Could not prepare the built-in proxy: {message}
error.pythonNotFound: Python 3.10+ was not found on PATH. Install Python 3 and try again.
error.pythonTooOld: Python 3.10+ is required (found {version}). Install a newer Python and try again.
error.bundledSourceMissing: Bundled proxy source not found. Reinstall the DeepSeek Bridge extension.
error.venvCreateFailed: Failed to create the Python virtual environment: {details}
error.pipNotFound: pip was not found in the virtual environment: {path}
error.bundledNotReady: Built-in proxy is not ready yet. Wait for preparation to finish, then try again.
error.proxyPathNotConfigured: Proxy executable path is not configured.
error.proxyStartupTimeout: Proxy startup timed out. Check the output panel and ensure ngrok is installed if tunneling is enabled.
